name: Soreheim Proper
operational_profile: Central tower-government sink where the Giant Council, Cloud Giant governance cadres, treaty chambers, quota ledgers, tribunal review, war manufacture, and refined distribution all converge.
role_density_note: Alliance-level rule is centralized here even when Eternal and Unternal domestic life is mediated through regional leaders, clans, and patron-families.
supporting_logic: Built from existing polity logic as downward-and-outward operational fill.
